items.title: Introducing GPT-5 | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been highly active in early 2026, releasing several major model upgrades. In March 2026, they launched GPT-5.4, described as their most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, featuring native computer-use capabilities, up to 1M token context, and significantly improved factual accuracy (33% fewer false claims compared to GPT-5.2). GPT-5.4 was rolled out across ChatGPT, the Codex platform, and the API. They also released a specialized GPT-5.3-Codex model focused on

items.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 Review — Pricing, Benchmarks & Capabilities (2026)
items.author: designforonline.com
items.snippet: OpenAI's most recent flagship model is GPT-5.4, launched on March 5, 2026. It represents the first mainline reasoning model to incorporate frontier coding capabilities from GPT-5.3-Codex, combining reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into a single model. Key features include a 1 million token context window, native computer-use capabilities (in Codex and the API), a 33% reduction in factual errors versus GPT-5.2, and improved tool-search that helps agents find and invoke the right tools acr

items.title: ChatGPT by OpenAI - Release Notes - April 2026 - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: OpenAI has released several significant API updates in early 2026. The most notable are the releases of GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano to the Chat Completions and Responses API, bringing GPT-5.4-class capabilities to faster, more cost-efficient models for high-volume workloads. GPT-5.4 itself is now available as the newest frontier model for professional work, alongside GPT-5.4 pro for compute-intensive tasks. The Sora API has also been expanded with reusable character references, longer video ge

items.title: OpenAI's Epic April 2026 Surge
items.author: www.digitalinfohub.net
items.snippet:
OpenAI made several significant announcements in April 2026. On the product side, GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro rolled out in ChatGPT, with GPT-5.4 also becoming available in the API and Codex, bringing advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows. OpenAI also retired GPT-4o from all plans effective April 3, 2026, and discontinued its Sora video-generation app due to high operational costs and poor demand. Codex expanded with pay-as-you-go pricing for teams.

items.title: Evaluating AI's Ability to Perform Scientific Research Tasks
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been actively publishing research in early 2026, with a strong focus on AI for scientific discovery and model safety. Key releases include work on GPT-5 accelerating science — including a preprint extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons with GPT-5.2 Pro assistance — and the introduction of Prism, a LaTeX-native research workspace powered by GPT-5.2. OpenAI also published a paper validating GPT as a measurement tool for qualitative empirical research, and launched FrontierScienc
